arts.ttl: Chelsea edge 'close to agreeing £17m' for 19-year-old defender starring in Ligue 1 as the Blues splash the case on yet another teenager
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly edging close to agreeing a deal with sister club Strasbourg for one of their highly-rated defenders amid an injury crisis for Blues boss Enzo Maresca (right).

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham now make contact to sign £10.2m striker but he could actually end up at Chelsea
Deal agreed: Chelsea set to sign €20million wonderkid
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly set to sign Strasbourg defender Mamadou Sarr in a deal worth around €20million, with the player agreeing to the move. The talented 19-year-old looks like an outstanding prospect and should end up being a good investment by the Blues if he continues to develop at his current rate. arts.ttl: Chelsea agree £17m deal for 'young defender' who had not even been linked with Blues move, he was 'unnamed' until now - journalist
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will be hoping that Chelsea are going to continue to be active in the transfer window during the month of January. The Blues...

arts.ttl: Chelsea to recall Caleb Wiley to facilitate €20m Mamadou Sarr transfer
arts.sum: As reported by RMC Sport, Chelsea are set to complete the transfer of Mamadou Sarr (19) from partner club RC Strasbourg Alsace. L’Équipe have now provided more details of the impending deal. Sarr will…

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Strasbourg defender to sign in summer for €20m fee?
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly close to agreeing a deal worth €20m (£16.93m) to sign one of Strasbourg's defenders during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: The VAR review: Should Arsenal be angry after Havertz VAR handball cost them win over Villa?
arts.sum: Was the VAR right to disallow Arsenal's late "winner" against Aston Villa? Should Carlos Baleba have been sent off against Manchester United?

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea summer signing is now being considered by Tottenham, Enzo Maresca hasn't ruled out an exit
arts.sum: He's attracting a lot of interest.

arts.ttl: Chelsea can still complete two huge transfers for free as Enzo Maresca makes honest statement
arts.sum: In a best-case scenario, Chelsea will have three fit senior players able to operate in midfield against Wolves on Monday evening. With Santos and Ugochukwu both in a position to make an immediate impact for Chelsea, if required, the recall options are essentially a get-out-of-jail-free card after Maresca settled so quickly on his preferred players and those who he didn't even fancy for a fringe squad road.

arts.ttl: Opinion: Chelsea target Dean Huijsen continues to impress at Bournemouth
arts.sum: I am a bit late in writing this one because of all the transfer news that has been going on and filling up our content quota last week. But off the back of Chelsea’s 2-2 draw with Bournemouth last week, there were some more direct auditions happening, just as there was with Liam Delap when […]
